title: RKX Aeter
description: A mutliplayer focused modpack designed to encourage player interactions.
body:
This modpack aims to promote interactions between players in multiplayer thorugh a variety of resource sparcity, making recipies slightly harder, and tweaking mobs. As many aspects will be harder than normal, there is more incentive to focus on one area of progression and work with others rather than try to do everything yourself.


This is still in the early stages of development so features may not be fully fleshed out yet, and many changes will be expected with each update.
Planned main features
- Extremely large and rare semi-realistic ore and mineral deposits
- Unique events related to progression (eg. mob invasions after creating a certain item)
- Diverging progression locked behind exploration
